source: Offline classroom trend snapshot adapted from public fashion tag patterns on Depop Explore, Pinterest Trends, and TikTok outfit hashtags.

trends.name: Graphic tee with baggy denim
trends.size_notes: Works across letter sizes because the styling relies on proportion more than exact fit.
trends.outfit_influence: Lean into a relaxed silhouette: baggy jeans, chunky sneakers, and one compact accessory so the tee stays central.

trends.name: Sporty vintage track layers
trends.size_notes: Oversized and true-to-size jackets both work; the trend favors easy layering.
trends.outfit_influence: Style the jacket with clean basics, relaxed pants, and sneakers so the vintage athletic layer feels intentional.

trends.name: Soft cottagecore midi styling
trends.size_notes: Works best when the waist and length are comfortable; belts or cropped layers can adjust proportions.
trends.outfit_influence: Pair the piece with soft layers, earth tones, and simple accessories to keep the look romantic but wearable.

trends.name: Combat boots with grunge basics
trends.size_notes: Shoe sizing matters most; styling works with slim or relaxed bottoms.
trends.outfit_influence: Ground the outfit with black denim, layered tops, and a practical bag so the boots feel like the anchor.
